item.title: "printer upgrade guide" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about printer upgrade guide through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your upgrades questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the upgrades questions home 3D-printing hobbyists keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The state of Calibration in 2026
item.description: A field report on calibration: where things stand, and what home 3D-printing hobbyists should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Filament without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to filament for home 3D-printing hobbyists — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "3d print stringing fix" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "3d print stringing fix" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why home 3D-printing hobbyists are rethinking Design
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how home 3D-printing hobbyists approach design — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Upgrades on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in upgrades — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Filament: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping filament for home 3D-printing hobbyists.
